{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323181412C0D85CF9B849DA3197F6"}"},"total":16102},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7369985886985978649","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"粉色小人鱼×高冷指挥官，设定蛮喜欢的。指挥官为人正直，自己做错了事就敢于承担责任，好感拉满了。小人鱼有点呆萌可爱，但也很聪明，反正我先爱了[害羞]舟舟的文笔自然是很好的，强推！（不大会写书评，但是真的好看）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1715961483,"group_id":"7369130801922837566","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"“摁”代表同意的时候又偷偷打了对方一下，所以——摁摁摁摁摁！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4ZAsk4cSY8rkhqshTr9NmUml85StxqwDMoLy1qLNNEa","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1de068ac1f2e46e194d7f8de781ce766~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789133&x-signature=V0vpT1j0nv%2FmKRdNRv1ZGQ1W6JM%3D","user_id":"3749787432917229","user_name":"舟小团子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3749787432917229","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1749135757,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#FFFFFF","can_worn":false,"id":17,"name":"击穿次元","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47c082300352c1a9e6e7669d207df6fb","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/57235e9992067573933a8f743e5f9044"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7369130801922837566","book_info":{"abstract":"【粉色小人鱼x高级指挥官】【温柔腹黑深情x坚韧凶狠残忍小可怜+黑化+狗血+甜虐+1v1+双洁he】
　　
　　星楠是一条稀有的粉色人鱼，稀有到人人觊觎，周遭的一切都危险至极，他从实验室逃出来后遇到的第一个人是裴闻炀。
　　
　　他求裴闻炀救自己。
　　
　　裴闻炀是他见过最温柔的人类，会为他吹头发烘衣裳摸他的脑袋说他乖。
　　
　　他喜欢这个人类。
　　
　　脱离危机后星楠自己以为是裴闻炀救了自己，欢喜地望着他，下一秒裴闻炀的枪支便抵到了星楠的眉心！
　　
　　他害怕他，却不能远离他。
　　
　　他要救自己，也要杀自己。
　　
　　那个人类是人类安全最高指挥官。
　　
　　“裴闻炀，你告诉我，我应该靠近你，还是远离你？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0ea8ac7abca95df2cc33934701b8500d","author":"有鱼入舟","author_id":"","book_id":"7369130801922837566","book_name":"说好禁欲指挥官，怎么偷亲我鳞片","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8d0c8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":89,"name":"精灵","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=89&name=精灵&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":484,"name":"HE","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=484&name=HE&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":846,"name":"黑化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=846&name=黑化&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7369139804442739262","read_count":"43107","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"708808"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.6","serial_count":"330","tags":"双男主,现代,精灵,腹黑,HE,双洁,1v1,黑化,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b0f2b90c535226a6e58fedda8567237b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779444852&x-signature=Z5M5FnmgpzIHNDQlhxrohu9XqNY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"b 直白星楠，对裴闻炀是天真善良的
在对其他的人，触碰他的红线，会善良地送走啦！
星楠好厉害的样子，地位好高的模样，唯一一条小粉鱼！
每日一遍：裴闻炀早日追妻
不要怪指挥官哦！他一个人很久了，而且心里也会认为自己会一直一个人下去，他不会忽然爱上一个人的。
突然有一个人出现，啊呸，一条鱼，喜欢他，是需要时间的！也许他已经有心动，但是他没有情感啊！他需要时间！
